title: Ofqual annual report 2024 to 2025
body: "This document contains the following information: Ofqual’s annual report and accounts for the period 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.  This is Ofqual’s 15th annual report and accounts submitted to Parliament. It sets out aims and activities in 2024 to 2025 and shows spending figures.  This paper was laid before Parliament in response to a legislative requirement or as a Return to an Address and was ordered to be printed by the House of Commons on 21 July 2025. "
